PASS: Complete three-tier pricing sheet (Basic $49, Pro $149, Enterprise $499) with monthly costs, usage limits, and concise value propositions per tier, delivered as a well-structured markdown file ready for PDF/web conversion, plus supporting cost rationale and revenue forecast.

FAIL #1: The deliverable is a thin, generic stub: each template uses near-identical copy-paste body text, vague unattributed 'study' ROI claims, and placeholder bracketed fields instead of genuinely personalized, sector-specific outreach — it reads like a first-draft outline, not finished work.

PASS: The deliverable provides a complete, step-by-step VM deployment checklist covering all required areas (OS setup, packages, environment variables, start-up scripts) with ready-to-run commands, verification steps, rollback procedures, and no unexpanded placeholders beyond intentionally flagged secret

PASS: The deliverable fully specifies the core usage metrics (QPD, ART, USS) with SQL calculations, defines a complete JSON logging schema and Kafka emission guarantees, and documents the storage location (Kafka, PostgreSQL interactions table, analytics view) with access control — ready for data team impl
